evals.name: ring-buffer
evals.expected_output: A refactored RingBuffer using const generics for CH and DEPTH, with process_block using a method-level const generic for SAMPLES

evals.name: matrix-lib
evals.expected_output: A Matrix<ROWS, COLS> with compile-time dimension checking on mul (cols must equal other.rows) and transpose returning Matrix<COLS, ROWS>

evals.name: protocol-parser
evals.expected_output: A ProtocolLayer<HEADER_SIZE, ALIGNMENT, MAX_PAYLOAD> with const fn align_up, derived buffer sizes in where bounds, and compile-time verified header/payload access
